name: Bound Skaven
description:
An inspiring Warlord who was captured during a botched Skaven raid on a Human encampment. It is your job to "interrogate" him. This was more a test than anything, I just wanted to see if the "Lore" (copied and pasted from the Warhammer wiki for the most part) would work, and it seems it does. Picture used is a cropped pic from Izrez (Source: https://www.furaffinity.net/view/33563787/).

Pretty please leave a review, I'd like to tweak it to make it more lore accurate!
creator: Jacobicius
